/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/PowerFlowUnitTests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/PowerFlowUnitTests.dir/tests/test_sparse_matrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PowerFlowUnitTests.dir/tests/test_sparse_complex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PowerFlowUnitTests.dir/tests/test_real_grid.cpp.o -o PowerFlowUnitTests  _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a
